# Image Recognize

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/imageRecognize`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/imageRecognize/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-SN4OtWT6.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-image-recognize`
- `query-image-recognize-single`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/videos/image-recognize`
- `/v1/videos/image-recognize/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Image Recognize",zh:"图像识别"},endpoints:[{id:"create-image-recognize",method:"POST",path:"/v1/videos/image-recognize",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},description:{en:"Recognize subjects, faces, and clothing in an image.",zh:"识别图像中的主体、人脸和服装。"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"image",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Image to be recognized",zh:"待识别的图片"},notes:[{en:"- Support inputting image Base64 encoding or image URL (ensure accessibility)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"Base64 Encoding Note:\nWhen using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Only provide the Base64-encoded string.\n\nCorrect Base64 format:\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUAAAAFCAYAAACNbyblAAAAHElEQVQI12P4//8/w38GIAXDIBKE0DHxgljNBAAO9TXL0Y4OHwAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==\n```\n\nIncorrect Base64 format (with data: prefix):\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUAAAAFCAYAAACNbyblAAAAHElEQVQI12P4//8/w38GIAXDIBKE0DHxgljNBAAO9TXL0Y4OHwAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==\n```\n\nPlease provide only the Base64-encoded string portion so that the system can correctly process and parse your data.",zh:"Base64 编码说明：\n请注意，若您使用 base64 的方式，请确保您传递的所有图像数据参数均采用 Base64 编码格式。在提交数据时，请不要在 Base64 编码字符串前添加任何前缀，例如 data:image/png;base64,。正确的参数格式应该直接是 Base64 编码后的字符串。\n\n正确的 Base64 编码参数：\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUAAAAFCAYAAACNbyblAAAAHElEQVQI12P4//8/w38GIAXDIBKE0DHxgljNBAAO9TXL0Y4OHwAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==\n```\n\n错误的 Base64 编码参数（包含 data: 前缀）：\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUAAAAFCAYAAACNbyblAAAAHElEQVQI12P4//8/w38GIAXDIBKE0DHxgljNBAAO9TXL0Y4OHwAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==\n```\n\n请仅提供 Base64 编码的字符串部分，以便系统能够正确处理和解析您的数据。"},{en:"- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png",zh:"- 图片格式支持 .jpg / .jpeg / .png"},{en:"- File size: ≤10MB, dimensions: min 300px, aspect ratio: 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px，图片宽高比介于 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1 之间"}]}],responseExample:{zh:'{\n  "code": 0, // 错误码；具体定义见错误码\n  "message": "string", // 错误信息\n  "request_id": "string", // 请求ID，系统生成，用于跟踪请求、排查问题\n
```
